title: dianthus anticarius subsp. occidentalis
intro: Dianthus anticarius subsp. occidentalis, also known as Western pink-avens, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Western pink-avens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Western pink-avens can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
